item.title: Siblings Switch Up So Fast
item.description: A funny sibling moment about how fast they can switch up on you. Tag your sibling if this feels a little too familiar.

media:content.media:title: Siblings Switch Up So Fast
media:content.media:description: A funny sibling moment about how fast they can switch up on you. Tag your sibling if this feels a little too familiar.

item.title: That Friend Who Just Buffers
item.description: A relatable little moment of being “that friend” when the brain just stops for a second. Simple, awkward, and way too familiar.

media:content.media:title: That Friend Who Just Buffers
media:content.media:description: A relatable little moment of being “that friend” when the brain just stops for a second. Simple, awkward, and way too familiar.

item.title: That one friend who teases you daily
item.description: POV: the friend who gently bullies you every day, and somehow that’s just how you show love.

media:content.media:title: That one friend who teases you daily
media:content.media:description: POV: the friend who gently bullies you every day, and somehow that’s just how you show love.

item.title: When your joke lands in silence
item.description: POV: you make a joke and the room goes quiet. You’re left laughing at your own joke while everyone else just stares.

media:content.media:title: When your joke lands in silence
media:content.media:description: POV: you make a joke and the room goes quiet. You’re left laughing at your own joke while everyone else just stares.

item.title: POV: Caught in the middle of it
item.description: Trying to console your friend, then suddenly you’re in the crossfire too. Like wait… I was just here to help.

media:content.media:title: POV: Caught in the middle of it
media:content.media:description: Trying to console your friend, then suddenly you’re in the crossfire too. Like wait… I was just here to help.

item.title: Practicing social skills, then canceling plans
item.description: POV: You rehearse your social skills in the mirror before going out... and then cancel your plans anyway.

media:content.media:title: Practicing social skills, then canceling plans
media:content.media:description: POV: You rehearse your social skills in the mirror before going out... and then cancel your plans anyway.
